work_completed: Inspected merged PR #33 and verified the actual package lifecycle hook is `prepack`, not `prepublishOnly`.
Updated `packages/otoi/README.md` with the build and npm package lifecycle contract for `dist/` entry points.
Updated `docs/development-process.md` with a `packages/otoi` build/publish runbook, active workflow coverage map, manual package release checklist, and common pitfalls.

Recorded the current package verification blocker: `@neurolift-technologies/toi@1.0.0` is the only published version and its tarball lacks `dist/`, so `.otoi` typecheck/build cannot resolve its types.
blockers: `npm run typecheck` and `npm pack --dry-run` in `packages/otoi` currently fail until a fixed `@neurolift-technologies/toi` package with `dist/` artifacts is published or otherwise made available.
decisions_made: Documented source-verified `prepack` behavior rather than repeating the PR title/body's stale `prepublishOnly` wording.
Updated existing package and development-process docs instead of creating a redundant release page.
decisions_pending: Maintainers still need to publish or provide a fixed `@neurolift-technologies/toi` dependency before `.otoi` can complete package release checks.
handoff_record.next_agent_notes: If continuing release work, start by checking `npm view @neurolift-technologies/toi versions --json`; once a fixed dependency exists, rerun `npm install --no-package-lock`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, and `npm pack --dry-run` from `packages/otoi/`.
